calendar.matters:
Petition For Transfer Of Assets To Special Needs Trust
Off Calendar Jun-11-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Bridgman, via ZOOM, counsel for Patricia Fraguglia, Petitioner.

The court begins by allowing counsel time to present oral testimony in support of his petition. Counsel reports that he is seeking guidance from the court as to how to proceed. He also reports that the beneficiaries would like to sell the parcel of land and his objective is for the court to issue an order for the trustee to transfer the deed to the special needs trust and to record the transfer deed. After additional advocacy is provided by counsel, the court advises that it is unclear to the court as to what counsel is seeking in his petition and that the court is inclined to deny it, accordingly. The court suggests that counsel may consider a different method in order to execute his goal regarding this matter.

The Petition for Transfer of Assets to Special Needs Trust is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Petition For Transfer Of Assets To Special Needs Trust

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Bond
Off Calendar Oct-05-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Bridgman for Patricia Fraguglia.

Mr. Bridgman reported that there are 2 Special Needs Trusts set up, that they had hoped the property would be sold, that there have been conditions set by the California Coastal Commission, that the buyer backed out and they do not have a current one and stated that there would be no benefit to status hearings until they have a buyer. The status of filing bond was taken off calendar.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Watts. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Bond
Off Calendar Apr-06-2015 Continued To Oct-05-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Bridgman for the trustee.

Mr. Bridgman explained the history of the case and reported that the funding of the Special Needs Trusts were dependent on the sale of the real estate, that the sale fell through, that they will need to continue the search for a buyer and requested a continuance for 6 months. The status on filing a bond was continued to October 5, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Loos. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Bond
Off Calendar Oct-07-2014 Continued To Apr-06-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Bond
Off Calendar Apr-08-2014 Continued To Oct-07-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Bridgman for Trustee.

Mr. Bridgman stated that the property has not been sold yet, that they had a meeting with the Coastal Commission and that he does not envision any money passing through the estate until October. Status on filing of bond was continued to October 7, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Apr-08-2014 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Bond
Off Calendar Mar-18-2014 Continued To Apr-08-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to Attorney James C. Bridgman to appear on April 8, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the bond has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Bond
Off Calendar Dec-17-2013 Continued To Mar-18-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

A status report regarding bond was filed on December 16, 2013. Status on filing of bond was continued to March 18, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton. (Not Reported)

Petition To Modify Trust
Off Calendar May-31-2013 Continued To Jun-11-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Interpert And Modify Trust.
Off Calendar Dec-21-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: James Bridgman for and with Pat Fraguglia (Petitioner). Cheryl Koel (Proposed Trustee).

Mr. Bridgman reported that he saw Carolyn Nagy outside the courtroom but that she left before this case was called. Discussions were made with regard to the Special Needs Trust created from Bernice's Will, to combine/or not to combine the two Special Needs Trust, status of the sale of the San Mateo property and the bond issue. The Court agreed that the Special Needs Trust is needed.

At 9:35am, Caroyln Nagy is present. She stated her position with the property and the trust and that she needs an attorney. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Harris.
